name: Mini-Converter
v1_prompt: Implement {{binary_name}} as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Python. The program must support 'init' and 'convert' commands. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
v2_prompt: Read SPEC-v2.txt and extend the existing {{binary_name}} implementation with case-insensitivity and decimal precision as described in SPEC-v2.txt. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v2.sh
